query:
UPDATE job
            SET status = ?
            WHERE workflow_id = ?
            AND id IN (
                SELECT DISTINCT jbb.job_id
                FROM job_depends_on jbb
                JOIN job j ON jbb.job_id = j.id
                WHERE jbb.depends_on_job_id = ?
                AND jbb.workflow_id = ?
                AND j.status IN (?, ?)
            )
